title: Ari's Modpack
body: This is a Modpack witch i've cobbled together its mainly meant for a group of friends who wanna play modded minecraft together There is performance mods, QOL mods, and some decor mods. Current Mods as of 2.0.3: ``` Iceberg [1.2.7] Architectury [13.0.8] YUNG's API [1.21.1-Fabric-5.1.3] Comforts [9.0.3+1.21.1] Continuity [3.0.0-beta.5+1.21] Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)
